comment.body:
Mmm, volatility will definitely grind up later, I laid it down in the weekly post, today too...
the only thing I underestimated was the potential geo risk unwound and its effect on vol selling.
remember: I called vol selling for this week, but called higher low. Well it made lower low after the ceasefire.
And even tho we are at the verge of a vol profile shift, we didn't flipped yet...
(and it is more like a spectrum, than a flip)

This is why I wrote today what I wrote about systematic flows. 
Now it is vol selling. Dovish hints, sentiment.
bcs they know that growth concerns are real and well-grounded.
FOMC and august will be a backstab.
But no vol spikes. Remember: vol of vol is sold
